mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN #{unit} = 'DAY' THEN DATE_FORMAT(p.status_at, '%Y-%m-%d') WHEN #{unit} = 'WEEK' THEN CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(p.status_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(p.status_at) DAY), '%m.%d'), ' ~ ', DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(p.status_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(p.status_at) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY), '%m.%d')) WHEN #{unit} = 'MONTH' THEN DATE_FORMAT(p.status_at, '%Y-%m') END AS label, COALESCE(SUM(p.total_charge), 0) AS revenue FROM payments p JOIN reservations r ON p.idx = r.idx WHERE p.pay_status = 'Success' AND p.status_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY label ORDER BY label;

SELECT om.option_name AS label,
ROUND( COUNT(orcd.option_id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservations r2 WHERE r2.checkin_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND r2.status != 'Cancelled') , 2) AS rate
FROM options_record orcd JOIN option_master om ON orcd.option_id = om.option_id JOIN reservations r ON orcd.idx = r.idx
WHERE r.checkin_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND r.status != 'Cancelled'
GROUP BY om.option_name;
